# Stack-Specific Instructions

This folder contains granular Copilot instruction files for individual technology stacks used in Enigmatry Entry Blueprint.
Each file is automatically applied by Copilot when the current task matches that stack.

## Files

| Title | Description |
| ----- | ----------- |
| [Accessibility instructions](a11y.instructions.md) | Guidance for creating more accessible code |
| [ASP.NET REST API Development](aspnet-rest-apis.instructions.md) | Guidelines for building REST APIs with ASP.NET |
| [Azure DevOps Pipeline YAML Best Practices](azure-devops-pipelines.instructions.md) | Best practices for Azure DevOps Pipeline YAML files |
| [Generic Code Review Instructions](code-review-generic.instructions.md) | Generic code review instructions customized for this project |
| [C# Development](csharp.instructions.md) | Guidelines for building C# applications |
| [DDD Systems & .NET Guidelines](dotnet-architecture-good-practices.instructions.md) | DDD and .NET architecture guidelines |
| [TypeScript Development](typescript-5-es2022.instructions.md) | Guidelines for TypeScript Development targeting TypeScript 5.x and ES2022 output |

Add new `*.instructions.md` files here as the project grows.
